"'''Spare Parts'''" is a 4-page comic that first appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 4]]''. The story was written by [[Mark Evanier]] and [[Sergio Aragonés]], art also by Sergio Aragonés, letters by [[Stan Sakai]], colors by [[Tom Luth]] and the editor was [[Scott Allie]].

==Plot summary==
On [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] are spotted and captured by [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]]. Seeing that the Jawas are disassembling other [[Droid/Legends|droids]] for spare parts, Threepio knocks two Jawas unconscious and steals their cloaks. However their escape is unsuccessful as the Jawas easily see through the droids' disguises.
